phases.title: Slack Definition Pillar (P0)

tasks.title: Implement src/server/slack-messages.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Add `specReady` and `planReady` Block Kit builders

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `/gwrk define 003` from Slack returns immediate acknowledgment and eventually posts a spec approval message.
Tapping `Approve` on a spec message triggers plan generation and posts a plan approval message.

phases.title: Conversational Agent Surface (P1)

tasks.description: NEW: Handle app mentions and threaded context

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/agent-context.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Utility to build project context for the agent from local files and SQLite

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `@gwrk what is the status of 003?` in Slack returns a coherent summary of the Slack feature.
`@gwrk help me think through the plugin system` triggers a thinking mode response.

phases.title: Webhook Hardening & Topology (P1)

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/slack-webhook.ts
tasks.description:
NEW: Extracted webhook logic for use in ship loop without Fastify

REVIEW FAIL (code): Type Safety — ADR-004.
  WHERE: src/utils/slack-webhook.ts:9
  EXPECTED: payload: Record<string, any> or specific type
  ACTUAL: payload: any
  FIX: Replace 'any' with a more specific type or 'Record<string, unknown>'. Also, refactor src/server/slack-notify.ts to use this extracted utility for consistency.
  REF: plan.md Phase 3 > Files > src/utils/slack-webhook.ts

tasks.title: Implement src/server/slack-notify.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY: Refine routing logic to respect `opsChannelId`

REVIEW FAIL (code): Build Error — FR-013.
  WHERE: src/server/slack-presence.ts:7-18
  EXPECTED: type: | ... | "pulse"
  ACTUAL: Missing "pulse" in SlackEvent type union
  FIX: Add "pulse" to the SlackEvent.type union in src/server/slack-presence.ts to allow pulse notifications in notify.ts.
  GATE: run-all-gates.sh (pnpm build)
  REF: plan.md Phase 3 > Webhook Hardening & Topology (P1)

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/ship.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Ensure ship loop uses `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL` directly if set

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 3
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: Running `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=... gwrk ship 003 1` posts to Slack even if the build server is offline.
Pulse summary appears in `#gwrk-ops` while phase updates appear in `#gwrk-dev`.
